violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Cut Deli Meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door fridge by the stove, and on the pizza prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two stand up coolers, the walk in cooler, and pizza unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hood systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Mixer was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized before use. Slicer was permanently taken out of service. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

The door to the outside, located in the dining room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2023
Food observed stored on shelves in the walk in freezer that are not at least 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
Food observed in containers not designed for food storage. Materials for food storage containers must be safe and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

The slicer was not in good repair, impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. Slicer must be removed from the establishment. The freezer was not in good repair, not in service at time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the portable fan have an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023
PIC was unable to turn on lights beneath small hood during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

The floors in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
The hood panels in the small hood have an accumulation of grease and dust. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in areas of the kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2023

Raw animal foods (such as eggs and chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce and cooked foods) in one Pepsi refrigerator and the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. English Refrigerator Separation Storage Poster New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, mixer, utensils on clean storage rack, and tongs hanging from oven) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

Assorted desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

The door to the outside, located in the dining room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food in the walk in cooler were stored on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
Establishment is reusing single-use items for food preparation and storage. Single-use items shall not be reused. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
Single service items are not stored at least 6 inches above the floor in the back storage area, and under the delivery driver table. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

The slicer is designed with gaps between pieces of metal, which are not sealed, impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. Slicer must be removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

Styrofoam observed lining a shelf in a Pepsi refrigerator. Cardboard observed lining shelves in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
One Pepsi refrigerator was not in good repair, with water dripping into a bowl inside. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: food prep unit pizza prep unit can opener base underside of shelves, and portion cup bin. The freezer has an accumulation of frost and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

The floors especially beneath fryers, and in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
The ansul system pipes beneath the hood have an accumulation of oil drips. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023

The ceiling and fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and mold. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
One ceiling panel in the storage area is stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
The hood panels have an accumulation of grease and dust. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2023
